docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-04-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKFIELD PROPERTIES MULTIFAMILY (CA) INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAMILTON, LENORA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROOKFIELD PROPERTIES MULTIFAMILY (CA) INC. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAMILTON, LENORA AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKFIELD PROPERTIES MULTIFAMILY (CA) INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-15-2026 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LENORA HAMILTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BROOKFIELD PROPERTIES MULTIFAMILY (CA) INC. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY HAMILTON, LENORA AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKFIELD PROPERTIES MULTIFAMILY (CA) INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-15-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
